positive: A maximalist, ornate, and deeply detailed celestial forest scene. The central subject is a majestic, stylized crescent moon cradling bioluminescent flora and mythological flora. The composition must be a perfectly symmetrical, centered medallion design suitable for apparel printing. Incorporate intricate linework, arabesque patterns, and subtle celestial elements like swirling nebulae and glowing constellations, rendered in a Victorian engraving style mixed with Art Nouveau geometry. Use a limited, high-contrast palette of deep indigo, sapphire blue, muted gold, and emerald green. Focus on strong silhouettes and negative space to ensure clean transfer onto fabric. The lighting should be ethereal and magical, emanating from the flora itself. Print-ready vector quality, intricate pattern art, symmetrical composition, clean edges, high contrast.
negative: blurry, noisy, watermark, logo, text, cropped, bad anatomy, artifacts, poorly drawn, extra limbs, low quality, grayscale, signature
